cau_hoi: When Tet holiday comes, Vietnamese people often feel inclined to ........................................ their houses.
giai_thich: do up: trang trí, dọn dẹp lại nhà

cau_hoi: Bob has a bad lung cancer and his doctor advised him to ........................................ smoking.
giai_thich: give up: từ bỏ thuốc lá

cau_hoi: When he realized the police had spotted him, the man ........................................ the exit as quickly as possible.
giai_thich: make for: hướng về phía lối thoát

cau_hoi: The government is thinking of bringing ........................................ a law to make it compulsory for cyclists to wear crash helmets.
giai_thich: bring in a law: ban hành một bộ luật mới

cau_hoi: Susan was alone in the house when the fire ........................................ .
giai_thich: break out: bùng phát (hỏa hoạn, chiến tranh)

cau_hoi: I think you need to ........................................ your ideas more clearly so that the reader doesn’t get confused.
giai_thich: set out: trình bày, sắp xếp ý tưởng

cau_hoi: Susie and Fran ........................................ us last night, so I had to quickly defrost a pizza.
giai_thich: drop in on sb: tạt vào thăm ai

cau_hoi: Rebecca ........................................ on our conversation to tell us that James had just been rushed into hospital.
giai_thich: cut in: nói xen vào cuộc hội thoại

cau_hoi: Is it a compulsion that the scheme ........................................ next Friday?
giai_thich: be carried out: được tiến hành (cấu trúc giả định)

cau_hoi: No one knows where Sam is living now. The last time that I ........................................ was about four years ago.
giai_thich: run into sb: tình cờ gặp ai

cau_hoi: All his plans for starting his own business fell ........................................ .
giai_thich: fall through: thất bại, không thành hiện thực

cau_hoi: Whenever a problem ........................................ , we try to discuss frankly and find solutions as soon as possible.
giai_thich: come up: vấn đề nảy sinh

cau_hoi: The computer isn’t working - it broke ........................................ this morning.
giai_thich: break down: máy móc bị hỏng

cau_hoi: The final year at the secondary school is the time for teenagers to get ........................................ thinking about choosing jobs.
giai_thich: get down to + V-ing: bắt đầu nghiêm túc làm gì

cau_hoi: On Friday night, some of our friends came to the party and ........................................ for the weekend.
giai_thich: stay on: ở lại lâu hơn dự định

cau_hoi: I have been looking ........................................ this book for months, and at last I have found it.
giai_thich: look for: tìm kiếm

cau_hoi: You can always ........................................ Ann to give you sound advice.
giai_thich: bank on sb: trông cậy vào ai

cau_hoi: The new manager ........................................ very strict rules as soon as he had taken over the position.
giai_thich: lay down rules: đề ra các quy tắc

cau_hoi: Everyone knows about pollution problems, but not many people have ........................................ any solution.
giai_thich: come up with: tìm ra, nảy ra (giải pháp)

cau_hoi: The speaker fails to get his message ........................................ to his audience.
giai_thich: get sth across: truyền tải được thông điệp

cau_hoi: She is a friendly person. She gets ........................................ all her neighbors.
giai_thich: get on well with: hòa hợp với hàng xóm

cau_hoi: Jack and Linda ........................................ last week. They just weren’t happy together.
giai_thich: break up: chia tay

cau_hoi: Brian asked Judy ........................................ to dinner and a movie.
giai_thich: ask sb out: mời ai đi chơi

cau_hoi: Her contract ........................................ in two months, so she’s looking for another job.
giai_thich: run out: hết hạn hợp đồng

cau_hoi: I’m not sure my brother will ever get married because he hates the feeling of being ........................................ .
giai_thich: tied down: bị ràng buộc

cau_hoi: It’s a small lamp, so it doesn’t ........................................ off much light.
giai_thich: give off: phát ra (ánh sáng, mùi hương)

cau_hoi: When I joined the army, I found it difficult to ........................................ out orders from my superiors, but I soon got used to it.
giai_thich: carry out orders: thực hiện mệnh lệnh

cau_hoi: If too many species ........................................ out, it will upset the ecosystem.
giai_thich: die out: tuyệt chủng

cau_hoi: It is very important for a film or a company to keep ........................................ the changes in the market.
giai_thich: keep up with: theo kịp sự thay đổi

cau_hoi: I’m saving all my pocket money ........................................ to buy a new PlayStation.
giai_thich: save up: tiết kiệm tiền

cau_hoi: The effect of the painkiller is ........................................ and I begin to feel the soreness again.
giai_thich: wear off: thuốc hết tác dụng, mất dần cảm giác

cau_hoi: Children should be taught that they have to ........................................ everything after they use it.
giai_thich: put away: cất dọn đồ đạc

cau_hoi: I can’t walk in these high-heeled boots. I keep ........................................ .
giai_thich: fall over: bị vấp ngã

cau_hoi: People are advised to ........................................ smoking because of its harm to their health.
giai_thich: cut down on: cắt giảm hút thuốc

cau_hoi: It took Ted a long time to get ........................................ the breakup of his marriage.
giai_thich: get over: vượt qua (sự đổ vỡ, cú sốc)

cau_hoi: The smell of the sea ........................................ his childhood.
giai_thich: take sb back to: gợi nhớ ai về kỷ niệm xưa

cau_hoi: Despite all the interruptions, he ........................................ with his work.
giai_thich: press on: tiếp tục kiên trì làm việc

cau_hoi: The new office block ........................................ well with its surroundings.
giai_thich: blend in: hòa hợp với không gian xung quanh

cau_hoi: It’s a serious operation for a woman as old as my grandmother. She’s very frail. I hope she ........................................ .
giai_thich: pull through: hồi phục sau cơn bạo bệnh

cau_hoi: It was very difficult to ........................................ what he was saying about the noise of the traffic.
giai_thich: make out: nghe được, hiểu được
